appearance.title: Appearance & Language

appearance.languageDesc: Your language preference is saved to your account (when signed in) and a local cookie.
appearance.festivalDesc: During festivals like Spring Festival, Mid-Autumn and Christmas we dress up the site a bit. You can turn it off if it's not your thing.
appearance.festivalGlobalDesc: When off, no festival decorations will be shown
